firmware.title: LE7-H697GHIJKL-R-GL-210518V369-210706V507_20210706192629
firmware.description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: LE7-H697GHIJKL-R-GL-210706V507
Changed Functions:
1.Updated Google Security Patch to June 5, 2021.
2.Added WeZone platform for LAN games. Have fun with your friends even if there is no network! Optimized issues:
Improved system stability and overall performance.
Reminding:
1.Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
Visit the TECNO spot forum (http://bbs.tecno-mobile.com) for more information.
